case_title: BIGDOUGH.COM INC. VS. TIBIRON RESEARCH GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIGDOUGH.COM INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TIBIRON RESEARCH GROUP, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIGDOUGH.COM INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIBIRON RESEARCH GROUP, INC. $3,256.65 PRINCIPAL, $76.73 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,558.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIGDOUGH.COM INC. SERVED SEP-28-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TIBIRON RESEARCH GROUP, INC. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON OCT-31-2011 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
